Interface IJsonSerializable

Namespace
ArcGIS.Shared.Internal.CIM
Assembly
ESRI.Server.CIM.dll

Implemented by CIM classes to provide support for JSON serialization and deserialization.

public interface IJsonSerializable

Methods

Deserialize(JObject, JsonDeserializationSettings)

Deserializes this object from its JSON representation.

void Deserialize(JObject jObject, JsonDeserializationSettings settings)

Parameters

jObject JObject
settings JsonDeserializationSettings

Serialize(JObject, JsonSerializationSettings)

Serializes this object to its JSON representation.

void Serialize(JObject jObject, JsonSerializationSettings settings)

Parameters

jObject JObject
settings JsonSerializationSettings
